name: Pollfish
description: Survey-based mobile monetization SDK delivering rewarded surveys to users in 140,000+ partner apps.

seo.title: Pollfish — Ad Monetization / Mediation
seo.meta_description: Pollfish: Survey-based mobile monetization SDK delivering rewarded surveys to users in 140,000+ partner apps.

when_to_use: Monetizing mobile apps with rewarded survey placements
Engaging users in 140k+ apps with survey-based rewards
Supplementing ad revenue with survey offerwall monetization

pros: Huge app network for survey reach
cons: Fill varies by survey demand cycles
Panels can saturate in small niches
Rev share not competitive with offerwalls
review.verdict: Solid rewarded survey SDK with research demand, but single-format limits overall revenue upside.
review.best_for: Apps adding a clean secondary revenue stream from market research demand.
review.not_for: Publishers wanting a primary monetization method or diverse offerwall inventory.

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: No explicit peak-lock evidence; default FALSE per rules.
